plan.failureSummary: Donobu click tool failed to find the age radio button element while filling the survey, leaving the flow stuck on step 1 instead of progressing to the Thank You page.
observedIndicators: Donobu click tool reported: "FAILED! Unable to resolve HTML element to operate with." for selector [data-testid='radio-age-25-34'], div:nth-of-type(2) > [role='radio'], div:nth-of-type(2) > [data-radix-collection-item=''].
Failure occurred during a PageAi-driven click step, not during final assertions.
Deterministic mode was used with cached instructions; failure is a missing/unresolvable element rather than a mismatched assertion state, so this is not the ambiguous stale-cache-success case.
Historical flow data shows high pass rate (0.84) with recent deterministic successes, indicating a regression or intermittent selector issue rather than a permanent application defect.
Failure screenshot shows the form on step 1 with name and email filled but selection step not reached, consistent with being unable to interact with the age-selection control.
Selectors reference a specific data-testid and structural nth-of-type path that may have changed or be unstable in an 'unstable survey' app.

remediationSteps.summary: Update Donobu SmartSelector targets for the age radio control.
remediationSteps.details: Inspect the current DOM of the age-selection question in the survey. Verify whether [data-testid='radio-age-25-34'] or the fallback nth-of-type selectors still exist. Replace them with more robust locators (e.g., stable data-testid attributes, accessible labels, or role=name combinations) and update the Donobu click tool configuration or PageAi cache accordingly.

remediationSteps.summary: Review PageAi prompt and tool orchestration to avoid over-specific structural assumptions.
remediationSteps.details: Although the high-level prompt is flexible, the cached selector list for the age radio is rigid. Adjust the Donobu/PageAi configuration so that element lookup prefers semantic cues (label text, question heading, role) over brittle nth-of-type selectors. Regenerate deterministic instructions if necessary so that future runs are less sensitive to minor layout changes.

remediationSteps.summary: Re-run the flow after selector updates or regenerated deterministic instructions.
remediationSteps.details: Once selectors for the age radio control are corrected, re-execute the Playwright test in deterministic mode. Verify that the survey progresses through the selection and reaches the /thank-you URL as asserted.

remediationSteps.summary: Confirm survey app UI contract for testability.
remediationSteps.details: Coordinate with the app owner to ensure key interactive elements (like survey options) expose stable attributes (e.g., data-testid or aria-label) that can be relied on by tests. Document these contracts to reduce future selector regressions in this 'unstable survey' demo app.

remediationSteps.summary: If selector updates do not resolve the issue, investigate for deeper UI or timing problems.
remediationSteps.details: If, after updating selectors, the test still intermittently fails to find the radio control, perform a manual debug with Playwright trace and console logs to rule out race conditions (e.g., dynamic re-rendering) or hidden modals overlapping the control, and adjust waits or application code as needed.

additionalDataRequests.description: Current DOM snippet for the age-selection question, including attributes on the 25–34 option.
suggestedSources: Browser devtools Elements panel on https://unstable-survey-dinoer.replit.app during the survey step
Playwright trace snapshots from the failing run

additionalDataRequests.description: Donobu test-flow-metadata.json and donobu-step-summary contents for this run to confirm how the selector list was generated and whether any prior fallback attempts were made.
suggestedSources: Attached Donobu JSON artifacts in the test-results directory

additionalDataRequests.description: Logs or diffs from the last successful run’s DOM around the age radio group to compare attribute or structure changes.
suggestedSources: Historical Playwright traces or snapshots from the baseline successful run
Version control diffs of the survey page template

plan.notes: The failure is localized to a Donobu click step unable to resolve the age radio element in deterministic mode. This points to a brittle or outdated selector set rather than a stale-cache-success scenario or core application defect. Given the high recent pass rate and that navigation and earlier inputs work, updating selectors and regenerating deterministic instructions is the most direct fix. Automatic retry without code changes is unlikely to succeed because the same missing selector will be used again.
